description_long: This object is a stylized, low-poly airplane with a predominantly light blue exterior and a dark-tinted cockpit canopy. The fuselage is angular and geometric, with a wide, flat nose and a sharply defined cockpit area. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection, featuring squared-off tips and a uniform thickness. At the rear, a boxy tail assembly includes a horizontal stabilizer and a vertical fin, both rendered in the same blue color. The cockpit canopy is dark and opaque, suggesting a single forward-mounted pilot seat. No visible landing gear or engine details are present, giving the airplane a simplified, almost toy-like appearance.
description: A stylized, angular light blue airplane with a dark cockpit canopy, straight mid-mounted wings, and a boxy tail assembly. The design is simple and geometric, with no visible landing gear or engine details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat nose, angular cockpit, and straight wings extending laterally.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, dark cockpit canopy, and boxy tail with horizontal stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear-front view displaying the cockpit canopy, wing symmetry, and the angular nose profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the tail and wing structure clearly visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy.
